MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff,John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Mark Capistrani.
Attorney, Francisco Torres, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, John Joseph , is present.
Attorney, Erik Jennings , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Penelope Pahl, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-04-2010 is vacated.
